title: Ghast x16
description: Replaces the Ghast and Happy Ghast textures with classic-style versions in 16x16 resolution.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c032d292f486f4710dc0d77969380dc4eba255f6.png)

## **📖 About**

This resource pack restores the classic 16x16 texture for the Ghast and introduces a Happy Ghast texture inspired by the old Ghast design.

**How to install**

For Modrinth web users:
- Click "Versions".
- Click the download button next to version you want.
- After you download Ghast_x16.zip go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip to <user>/roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks

For Modrinth app users:
- Click "Versions".
- Click the download button next to version you want.

### **⚙️ Compatibility**
**Optifine is NOT required (as well as EMF and ETF).**

Version warnings can be safely ignored if you’re on a supported version. 🙃
